2604.13459.title: Asymmetric-Loss-Guided Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM-Attention Model for Industrial RUL Prediction with Interpretable Failure Heatmaps
2604.13459.paper_summary: Turbofan engine degradation under sustained operational stress necessitates robust prognostic systems capable of accurately estimating the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of critical components. Existing deep learning approaches frequently fail to simultaneously capture multi-sensor spatial correlations and long-range temporal dependencies, while standard symmetric loss functions inadequately penalize the safety-critical error of over-estimating residual life. This study proposes a hybrid architecture integrating Twin-Stage One-Dimensional Convolutional Neural Networks (1D-CNN), a Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) network, and a custom Bahdanau Additive Attention mechanism. The model was trained and evaluated on the NASA Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System Simulation (C-MAPSS) FD001 sub-dataset employing a zero-leakage preprocessing pipeline, piecewise-linear RUL labeling capped at 130 cycles, and the NASA-specified asymmetric exponential loss function that disproportionately penalizes over-estimation to enforce industrial safety constraints. Experiments on 100 test engines achieved a Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 17.52 cycles and a NASA S-Score of 922.06. Furthermore, extracted attention weight heatmaps provide interpretable, per-engine insights into the temporal progression of degradation, supporting informed maintenance decision-making. The proposed framework demonstrates competitive performance against established baselines and offers a principled approach to safe, interpretable prognostics in industrial settings.
2604.13459.paper_summary_zh: 渦輪風扇引擎在持續操作壓力下的劣化需要強大的預測系統，能夠準確估計關鍵組件的剩餘使用壽命 (RUL)。現有的深度學習方法經常無法同時捕捉多傳感器的空間相關性和長期的時間依賴性，而標準的對稱損失函數對於過度估計剩餘壽命的安全關鍵錯誤懲罰不足。本研究提出了一種混合架構，整合了雙階段一維卷積神經網絡 (1D-CNN)、雙向長短期記憶 (BiLSTM) 網絡和自定義的Bahdanau加性注意機制。該模型在NASA商業模塊化航空推進系統模擬 (C-MAPSS) FD001子數據集上進行了訓練和評估，採用了零洩漏預處理管道、以130個循環為上限的分段線性RUL標記，以及NASA指定的非對稱指數損失函數，該函數對過度估計進行不成比例的懲罰，以強化工業安全約束。在100台測試引擎上的實驗達到了17.52循環的均方根誤差 (RMSE) 和922.06的NASA S-Score。此外，提取的注意權重熱圖提供了可解釋的每台引擎的劣化時間進程見解，支持知情的維護決策。所提出的框架在與既定基準的競爭性能上表現出色，並為工業環境中的安全、可解釋的預測提供了一種原則性的方法。
2604.13459.author: Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah et.al.
